overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring Aloy traversing a snowy mountain ridge during a dramatic golden sunset. The character approaches and passes a tall metal spire, encounters a mechanical Tallneck in the distance, and continues along the cliff edge with expansive views of the valley and water below.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snowy ridge toward a tall metal spire structure ahead

entered.detail: snow-covered path along the mountain ridge with footprints
large body of water visible in the valley below reflecting sunlight
steep rocky cliff face covered in snow rising on the left
tall futuristic spire structure with glowing elements at the top
distant valley filled with snow-covered pine trees

segments.scene_description: Aloy walks along a wide snowy mountain ridge with clear views of a distant lake and forested valleys. The sun is low in the sky creating a warm golden backlight. She approaches a tall metal spire structure ahead on the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain ridge with mechanical creature overlook

events.description: large mechanical Tallneck creature becomes visible on the left ridge
sunlight shifts to warmer pink and orange tones as sun descends lower

agents.ego_description: passing the tall spire and continuing along the ridge with the mechanical creature visible to the left

notable_agents.action: mechanical Tallneck standing stationary on the ridge with its long neck extended

entered.detail: large giraffe-like mechanical creature with a long neck and circular head
jagged rock formations covered in snow along the path edge

segments.scene_description: Aloy passes the tall metal spire as a large mechanical Tallneck comes into view on the left ridge. The path continues along the cliff edge with snow-covered rocks nearby. The lighting shifts to warmer pink hues as the sun continues to set.

events.description: sunset intensifies with dramatic pink and purple clouds filling the sky

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff edge toward the sunset with expansive valley views ahead

entered.detail: vibrant pink orange and purple sunset sky with scattered clouds
steep rocky cliff face covered in snow rising prominently on the left

segments.scene_description: Aloy continues along the cliff edge as the mechanical creature fades into the distance. The scene opens to a dramatic overlook with the sun setting over the water, casting vibrant pink and purple hues across the sky and snow-covered peaks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy mountain ridge that transforms from a golden-lit trek into a vibrant sunset overlook. It begins with Aloy walking across a wide, snow-covered path under a warm golden backlight, with distant lakes and forested valleys visible in the valley below. As she approaches and passes a tall metal spire, the scene expands to reveal a mechanical Tallneck on a neighboring ridge while the lighting shifts toward warmer pink hues. The camera then continues along the cliff edge, watching the mechanical creature fade into the distance as the terrain opens into a dramatic overlook. Finally, the vista culminates in a wide view of the sun setting over the water, casting deep pink and purple tones across the sky and the surrounding snow-capped peaks.
